fields.gap_category: data_source | calculation | screening | visualization | backtesting | risk_model | alert | cross_vertical
fields.title: string — concise feature name

priority_score.impact: 1-10 — how much analytical capability this adds
priority_score.recency_boost: +0.1 if gap found in last 21 days

fields.cross_vertical_flag: boolean — true if bridges to REPE/Credit/PDS

dependencies: list of packages or API keys needed

fields.meta_prompt: string or null — filled in Phase 3
fields.target_module: string — which Winston module this belongs to
fields.lineage_note: string — which segment rotation surfaced this gap
